3034770.name: SUPEv3
3034770.description:
Hi Everyone!

Here in this project, I aim to deliver an inexpensive fps ultimate survival game maker that really helps you create your own open world, dayz theme like games. without scripting and with more than 100 free assets in a minute!

Pros:

1.no coding!
2.more than 100 ready assets!
3.some basic survival element implanted.
4.every game that created by this engine could be run and sold as standalone!

Cons:

1.only demo version is ready for tests and reduce bugs.
2.sadly im the last one who is running this project.
3.more survival elements and more enemies should be added.

Important:

For running and playing your created games press "F10" on your keyboard.

So only thing that i asking you guys is , that help me and support me by joining my discord channel giving me advice , help and send me some survival fan arts to add to the engine!

This version is only for tests (not for game making the real version needs more update s to be delivered) for taking news and updates follow me in my discord channel.


If you are a dayz , stalker , scum enjoyer and have patient , this engine is for you , but if you want a complete engine and if you want another kind of game plays you should wait for us to deliver more!



here is my discord channel link:
